SessionStart.prompt: Check if `.ai-sync/HANDOFF.md` exists in the project root. If it does, read it silently and keep the context in mind — the project uses cross-agent synchronization. Do NOT print the handoff contents unless the user asks. Just be aware of the current state and continue accordingly.

Stop.prompt: If `.ai-sync/HANDOFF.md` exists and you made meaningful changes during this session, remind the user: 'Run `/handoff` to save state for other AI agents before switching tools.' Keep this reminder to one short line.
